overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a video game (GTA V style) showing a nighttime walk along a coastal beachfront. The player character walks along a covered promenade, passes people seated under umbrellas, transitions onto the beach sand, walks along the shoreline past stilt houses, climbs wooden stairs to street level, and continues along a residential road.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a covered beachfront walkway with colorful storage lockers lining the right side and stilt houses visible across the beach to the left. The camera holder walks forward, briefly turns right around a building corner revealing a parking lot and exterior wall light, then turns back left to continue along the promenade.

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches an outdoor seating area under a blue and white umbrella where two people are seated near a grill. The covered walkway roof and storage lockers exit the frame as the camera passes the seating area, while the beach houses remain visible in the background, appearing closer.

turns right to walk parallel to shoreline facing the stilt houses

agents.ego_description: walking along the beach shoreline on sand, passing wooden stairs leading up to coastal houses

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions from the paved walkway onto beach sand, moving toward the shoreline. The ocean waves become visible to the left while the stilt houses shift from the left side to the right as the camera turns to walk parallel to the water. Wooden stairs providing access to the houses from the beach appear along the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden staircase ascending between beach houses

reaches top of stairs emerging onto residential street

agents.ego_description: climbing wooden stairs between closely spaced beach houses, moving from beach level to street level

segments.scene_description: The camera leaves the beach sand and begins ascending a steep wooden staircase sandwiched between beach houses. The ocean and beach exit the frame as the camera climbs upward, with the stilt houses now passing by on the left side. Mountains become visible in the distance between the buildings.

agents.ego_description: walking along asphalt residential street at night, passing utility poles and suburban houses

wooden telephone pole with power lines
single-story residential buildings with satellite dishes
satellite antenna on house roof

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the stairs onto a residential street, the camera continues walking along the asphalt road. Utility poles and suburban houses with satellite dishes line the street, while the beach houses and stairs exit the frame behind. The mountain backdrop remains visible in the distance as the camera moves through the quiet neighborhood.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey that begins on a covered beachfront promenade and ascends through a coastal settlement into a quiet residential neighborhood. It begins along a paved walkway lined with colorful storage lockers, briefly pivoting around a building corner to reveal a parking lot before returning to the path. As the camera passes an outdoor seating area with a blue and white umbrella, the covered roof recedes and the view opens up, transitioning from the pavement onto the beach sand. The camera then turns to walk parallel to the ocean waves, passing stilt houses and wooden stairs before ascending a steep staircase that lifts the perspective above the shoreline to reveal distant mountains. Finally, the scene emerges from the stairs onto an asphalt residential street, moving past utility poles and suburban houses with satellite dishes under the mountain backdrop.
